conservative.name: Exorcism
conservative.requirements:
7 power
daemon or possessed target and a light source within close range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to the dice pool

success.description: Effect: You attempt to banish a daemon or evil force. While this spell is recharging, you and the target must engaged in a battle of wills during each of your respective Beginning of Turn phases. This requires a Discipline (WP) vs. Discipline (WP) opposed check. A character who fails this check may not act on his turn. A success by either competitor with or wins the battle. If you win, the target is banished, which effectively kills it. If the target wins or if this spell recharges with the battle unresolved, you lose 5 power and gain the Rattled condition for 5 turns
